creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Thanks so much for your help here!

I tried your shar file. The module builds fine, and authenticates well
against my crowd server.

The deal with the -O2 is that the vendor claims it breaks the program, so I
tried to neuter it. I do not observe any failures with it, so it may have
been on an older version of their software and/or gcc.
